# Transcrição: 01- Course 9 - Mistakes Real Estate Investors Make, And How To Avoid Them All

- **Fonte:** 01- Course 9 - Mistakes Real Estate Investors Make, And How To Avoid Them All
- **Duração:** 01:54
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:54]

So look, I want to share with you the mistakes real estate investors make and how you can avoid them all. I have made many, many mistakes investing in real estate, none of which by the way included losing money. But people make mistakes, there's no surprise there. And because you're worried about making mistakes, you typically don't pull the trigger. Because real estate investors are only human, it's no surprise that even the most experienced among us all make mistakes and missteps. I admit I've made bad choices and gone down the wrong path more times than I can count, most of which I didn't go down a path, I didn't pull the trigger, I didn't buy a deal, I sold a deal and I didn't buy more. But look, I don't stress out about it. Why? Because I learned from these experiences and use the power of my mistakes to power future deals and investments. Beyond that, I use these takeaways to hone my skills so I can better teach new real estate investors like you how to excel, how to avoid the mistakes, how to process and how to take advantage of what experience has taught me. Look, a genius is not a person who never makes mistakes. A genius is someone who learns from the mistakes of others and doesn't make those mistakes. The goal of this module is simple. To highlight for you, the all too common mistakes even experienced real estate investors make so you can avoid them. From doing too little to completely balking to thinking and acting small, there are plenty of speed bumps standing between you and your goals. Let's get rid of the common made mistakes. Avoid them and your journey will be more manageable, more successful and if you're not reactive, it will require less stress.
